memberdef.name: CreateGameSession

briefdescription.para: Create a new game session.

parameterdescription.para: The game session creation request body.
This will be called if the operation succeeded.
This will be called if the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the session.
This will be called if the operation succeeded.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: QueryGameSessions

briefdescription.para: Query game sessions.

parameterdescription.para: Query object containing the parameters to query on.
This will be called if the operation succeeded.
This will be called if the operation failed.
Pagination offset.
Pagination limit.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

This will be called if the operation failed.

This will be called if the operation failed.

This will be called if the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: PromoteGameSessionLeader

briefdescription.para: Promote a new game session leader by user ID (only applicable for current game session leader).

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the game session to update.
The user ID of the new leader to promote.
This will be called if the operation succeeded.
This will be called if the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

This will be called if the operation failed.

This will be called if the operation failed.

This will be called if the operation succeeded.

memberdef.name: StorePlayerAttributes

briefdescription.para: Update stored attributes for the current player.

parameterdescription.para: Request model for updating attributes for this player.
This will be called if the operation succeeded.
This will be called if the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &PartySessionID, FAccelByteModelsV2PartySessionStorageReservedData const &Data, THandler< FAccelByteModelsV2PartySessionStorageReservedData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: StorePersonalDataToReservedPartySessionStorage

briefdescription.para: Store a data by current player to its party reserved personal storage. WARNING: Overwrite operation! This function will be used by AccelByte OSS internally and won't be exposed as a function.

parameterdescription.para: Current player's party ID.
Player's data to be stored.
This will be called if the operation succeeded.
This will be called if the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: DeletePlayerAttributes

briefdescription.para: Delete stored attributes for the current player.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called if the operation succeeded.
This will be called if the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &SessionID, FJsonObjectWrapper const &Data, THandler< FJsonObjectWrapper > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateLeaderStorage

briefdescription.para: Update leader's session storage data, can only be updated by current session leader. this will overwrite leader storage data, if updating also provide latest leader storage. to clear current leader storage data update with empty jsonObject.

parameterdescription.para: Data to update leader storage.
This will be called if the operation succeeded.
This will be called if the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &SessionID, FJsonObjectWrapper const &Data, THandler< FJsonObjectWrapper > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateMemberStorage

briefdescription.para: Update current user's session member storage data. this will overwrite this user's storage data, if updating also provide latest user's storage. to clear current user's storage data update with empty jsonObject.

parameterdescription.para: Data to update member storage.
This will be called if the operation succeeded.
This will be called if the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &PartyID, FJsonObjectWrapper const &Data, THandler< FJsonObjectWrapper > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdatePartyStorage

briefdescription.para: Update current user's party session member storage data. This allows users to update or insert their own party storage (non-immutable). This will overwrite this user's party storage data. Can store generic JSON.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the party session.
Generic JSON data to update party storage.
This will be called if the operation succeeded.
This will be called if the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsV2SessionRecentPlayers > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, const int32 Limit=20)
memberdef.name: GetRecentPlayers

briefdescription.para: Query recently met users in a game session.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called if the operation succeeded.
This will be called if the operation failed.
Number of recent players to request, maximum value is 200.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsV2SessionRecentPlayers > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, const int32 Limit=20)
memberdef.name: GetRecentTeamPlayers

briefdescription.para: Query user's recent player who were on the same team.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called if the operation succeeded.
This will be called if the operation failed.
Number of recent players to request, maximum value is 200.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &SessionID, THandler< FAccelByteModelsV2SessionJoinedSecret > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetSessionSecret

briefdescription.para: Used by game client to get a session secret that is saved in session service. The secret will only return the secret value when the Enable Secret Validation option is set true (in the Admin Portal).

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the game session.
This will be called if the operation succeeded.
This will be called if the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.
